annex_meaning.II: PROHIBITED — must not be present in cosmetic products
annex_meaning.III: RESTRICTED — allowed only with conditions / max concentrations
annex_meaning.IV: ALLOWED COLORANTS — list of permitted colorants
annex_meaning.V: ALLOWED PRESERVATIVES — list of permitted preservatives
annex_meaning.VI: ALLOWED UV FILTERS — list of permitted UV filters
